chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1410 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 10.08.2023 None present for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- The petitioner being civil servant has filed this petition for his appointment and posting at a designated place. A civil servant could hardly maintain a petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan 1973 and is also barred under Article 212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan 1973. Even otherwise, the petitioner has not appeared. Dismissed JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
